name: Indian-Style Stuffed Baked Potatoes with Bell
recipeIngredient: 4 Carrots, scrubbed and sliced into 1/2 inch thick pieces
2 Zucchini, halved and sliced into 1/2 inch thick pieces
3 Yellow bell peppers, seeded and cut lengthwise into strips
1 1/2 tsp Minced jalapeno peppers (more or less to taste)
recipeInstructions:
Chutney: Combine chutney ingredients in a food processor and puree until smooth. Set aside.
Potatoes and vegetables:
Preheat oven to 400°F. Prick potatoes and bake for 1 hour.
Place carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers on a non-stick baking tray or trays lined with parchment paper. Drizzle or spray with oil and season with salt.
Bake vegetables about 45 minutes, turning once, until tender and browned.
Remove baked potatoes from oven and cut in half lengthwise. Scoop out the flesh into a bowl, leaving a 1/2-inch-thick potato shell. Mash the potato flesh.
Mix in cilantro, soy cheese, jalapenos, and salt if desired.
Spoon the potato mixture into shells and return to oven for about 15 minutes to reheat. Top with roasted vegetables and drizzle with chutney and a sprinkle of mustard seeds if desired. Serve 2 potato halves per person.
